## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `bash -n scripts/*.sh`
- [ ] `shellcheck scripts/*.sh`
- [ ] Lua configuration syntax checked
- [ ] Installation-impacting changes reviewed manually

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No personal paths, hostnames, tokens, or secrets were committed
- [ ] Existing user configuration is not deleted without a backup
- [ ] README instructions were updated when behavior changed
